name: webhook-action
description: POST agent lifecycle events to an HTTP endpoint. Supports method/headers overrides and a templated body.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Webhook URL
x-meta.help: The HTTPS endpoint the event is POSTed to when this trigger fires.

x-meta.label: Headers (JSON)
x-meta.help: Optional JSON object of extra request headers, e.g. {"Authorization": "Bearer …"}. Content-Type defaults to application/json.

x-meta.label: Body template
x-meta.help: Optional. Template with $EVENT, $CONTEXT, $now, $job_name, etc. Leave blank to send the full event JSON as-is.
